top_signals.title: Ubisoft shares plunge 18% after Assassin’s Creed maker warns of annual profit loss
top_signals.summary: Ubisoft shares plunged 18% on Thursday after the Assassin's Creed maker warned of further losses this year.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SpaceX IPO puts Musk’s AI empire – and losses – under the spotlight
top_signals.summary: SpaceX has finally opened its books to public markets, revealing a company generating tens of billions in revenue, burning through cash at an extraordinary speed and betting its future on AI as much as rockets. The long-awaited Nasdaq float, expected next month, could value Elon Musk’s space and AI empire at as much as $1.75 [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
